attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_HZ_PARTY_SITES)

FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG_HZ_PARTY_SITES STG_CG_HZ_PARTY_SITES,
  (
 select PARTY_SITE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG_HZ_PARTY_SITES
 minus
 select PARTY_SITE_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG_HZ_PARTY_SITES
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.PARTY_SITE_ID = STG_CG_HZ_PARTY_SITES.PARTY_SITE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG_HZ_PARTY_SITES.REFRESH_DATETIME
